name: AstroPaperStarter
notes: Custom AstroPaper starter generated from the local custom blog skeleton. It keeps the src/data/blog content layout, nested folder-based categories, category order sorting, user-settings.json site settings, Markdown extensions, Pagefind build script, and Docker preview setup. Personal posts, personal images, generated output, dependencies, git data, Pagefind output, and local migration scripts are excluded.
